query:
UPDATE availability 
SET weekStartDate = '2026-02-09 00:00:00',
    weekEndDate = '2026-02-15 23:59:59'
WHERE weekStartDate = '2026-02-08 11:00:00' OR weekStartDate = '2026-02-08 05:00:00' OR weekStartDate = '2026-02-08 00:00:00';
